items.name: Flat Repair
items.description: Tube replacement or patch on the spot. Most bikes done in under 30 minutes.

items.name: Chain Replacement
items.description: We'll check your chain wear and replace if needed. Includes derailleur check and indexing.

items.name: Brake Bleed (Hydraulic)
items.description: Full hydraulic brake bleed for consistent stopping power. Available for most brake brands.

items.name: Wheel Truing
items.description: Wobble or hop? We'll true your wheel back to straight. Stand-alone or part of a service.

items.name: Cable & Housing
items.description: Full cable replacement for brake or shifter systems. Restores crisp, responsive feel.

items.name: Crash Damage Assessment
items.description: Thorough inspection after a crash. We'll document damage and recommend repairs or replacement.
